productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women  Winter Black Top
description: CompositionBlack sleeveless flat knit top made of 80% cotton, 17% nylon and 3% spandex, has a round neckline, raglan sleeve design covered by 100% polyester pleats, elasticated armholes, ribbed hemline and a sash belt on the waistlineFittingRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadecool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this black flat knit top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The pleated layers on the shoulders lend this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
